name: Joe McCulla
abilities: ★ Team Sleepy Joe — a front-nine contender who peaks, reliably, in the lawn chair by the turn. The back nine is for resting.
The Record. 2022 — 4th overall (net 143); 2023 — DQ, did not finish Saturday; 2025 — 9th and pairs runner-up with Owen Thompson (288).
flavor: “I'm horrible at golf and will take a 15 handicap. I will not address any challenges, it is final.”
caption: Joe McCulla · Truffle Hogs 🐗
